test-method.name: TC_02_01_createCampaignWithValidData
test-method.description: TC_02_01 - Create campaign with valid budget, timeline, and platform

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.cssSelector: button[type='submit'] (tried for 60 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.138, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\raghu\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58979}, goog:processID: 8468, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58979/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.138, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: dd2ff8559ba0c25b4bd97effa1f992be

test-method.name: TC_02_02_createCampaignNameTooShort
test-method.description: TC_02_02 - Campaign creation fails if name is less than 3 characters

exception.message: Validation error for short name should be displayed expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Validation error for short name should be displayed expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at test-method.name: TC_02_03_createCampaignPastStartDate
